BattleCore
MAX

India's premier esports tournament platform. Compete in Free Fire, BGMI, and more. Create tournaments, win prizes, and join a community of champions.

Google PlayApp Store
v2.105.4.92 • PROTECTED BY VANGUARD
Features

Built for Champions

Everything you need to compete, create, and conquer in the Indian esports arena.

🏆

Tournaments

Join Free Fire, BGMI, and other esports tournaments. Compete against the best players in India and win real prizes.

🎮

Create Events

Host your own tournaments with flexible tier systems — Standard, Sponsored, or Premium. Set entry fees, prize pools, and rules.

⚡

Elite Pass

Unlock exclusive rewards with Battle Pass, Elite Pass, or Supreme Pass. Climb the ranks and earn premium benefits.

🛡️

Secure Wallet

Integrated payment system with Cashfree. Safe deposits, withdrawals, and automated prize distribution for every match.

🤝

Partner Program

Become a sponsored or premium partner. Grow your audience, earn platform fees, and get featured across the platform.

🔴

Live Updates

Real-time match notifications, live scores, and instant result declarations. Stay in the action at all times.

Download

Get BattleCore Now

Available on Android and iOS. Join thousands of players competing in India's fastest-growing esports platform.

About

Why BattleCore?

For Players

  • Join Free Fire, BGMI, and multi-game tournaments
  • Real-time match updates and live scoreboards
  • Secure wallet with instant prize payouts
  • Elite Pass system with exclusive rewards
  • Compete against India's best players

For Hosts

  • Create Standard, Sponsored, or Premium events
  • Flexible entry fees and prize pool management
  • Partner program with platform fee earnings
  • Dedicated tier system with increasing benefits
  • Grow your audience and build your brand
